creator: keith.dev.uk@gmail.com
text:
I noticed this message while installing qt5.

    Message from sqlite-2.8.17_4:

    ===>   NOTICE:

    The sqlite port currently does not have a maintainer. As a result, it is
    more likely to have unresolved issues, not be up-to-date, or even be removed
    in the future. To volunteer to maintain this port, please create an issue at:

    https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla

I would like to volunteer to maintain the relevant packages.
